sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47027" key="h(merwth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερ-ωτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n47027.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tamer, civilizer</tr_>, of Hercules, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:3:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
